UI_PAV_EnableTooltip: Master switch for all PeekAView features. When off, the game renders cutaways exactly like vanilla.
UI_PAV_RangeTooltip: How far around the player to project wall cutaways, in tiles. 5 matches vanilla's raster; 20 is PeekAView's full extended range.
UI_PAV_FixB42Tooltip: Fixes a vanilla B42 bug where walls vanish on the upper floor when player-built stairs or floors sit next to them.
UI_PAV_AimStanceOnlyTooltip: When on, PeekAView only enables while you are in nimble stance (holding right-click to aim a weapon), and turns off as soon as you lower it. Useful if you only want extended cutaway during combat.
UI_PAV_DrivingSpeedTooltip: When driving, PeekAView stays active up to this speed and then turns off so you can see traffic and obstacles normally. Set to 0 to always disable PeekAView while in a vehicle. 35 km/h covers typical city driving.
UI_PAV_DrivingSpeedDescription: PeekAView while driving. 0 km/h = always off in a vehicle.
